# Bundled frontend dependencies

Finora bundles these assets so the desktop application remains fully functional offline:

- Bootstrap 5.3.0
- Chart.js 4.5.1
- Lucide 1.24.0
- Inter 5.2.8 via Fontsource
- Plus Jakarta Sans 5.2.8 via Fontsource

Their upstream license texts are preserved in `static/vendor/licenses/`.
